overview: FIR Management System for Mokokchung Police Station — enables police personnel to upload FIR documents, auto-summarize content using AI, view and edit summaries, and export them for Word documents.
features: FIR document upload with file validation and progress feedback
View and edit summaries with save confirmation
One-click copy of summary text for Word import
Role-based access for authorized police personnel
Upload history with date, status, and uploader tracking
